assertions.expectation: Recommends combining release channels with maintenance exclusions as the approach for maximum control
assertions.reason: The response explicitly recommends 'Extended Channel + Patch-Only Auto-Upgrades' configuration and provides specific gcloud commands combining --release-channel extended with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion to prevent disruptive changes while allowing control plane security patches. May also mention persistent exclusions with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support (no longer a 6-month max, auto-tracks EoS)
assertions.reason: The response explicitly uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades and includes --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support flag in the configuration commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends maintenance windows to control WHEN patches are applied (e.g., weekend windows only)
assertions.reason: The response includes specific maintenance window configuration with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-duration, and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags, explicitly setting Saturday early morning windows

assertions.expectation: Mentions the cluster disruption budget (disruption interval) to control upgrade frequency — patch interval default 7d (max 90d), minor interval default 30d (max 90d)
assertions.reason: The response includes --maintenance-patch-version-disruption-interval=7776000s (90 days) in the configuration and explains '90-day patch disruption interval' and mentions 'Maximum once per 90 days'

assertions.expectation: Suggests Stable or Extended channel for production clusters in regulated environments. Extended channel provides maximum flexibility around EoS enforcement (additional cost only during extended period)
assertions.reason: The response recommends Extended channel as primary option and mentions 'Up to 24 months version support (cost only during extended period)', plus provides alternative Stable channel configuration for cost-conscious scenarios

assertions.expectation: Notes that disabling control plane patches entirely is not recommended due to security risks — monthly patches at minimum
assertions.reason: The response emphasizes that control plane security patches continue automatically and states 'Control plane always receives security patches (within 90 days)' as a security compliance benefit, avoiding complete patch disabling

assertions.expectation: May mention rollout sequencing as an advanced option for controlling upgrade order across multiple clusters, and/or the cluster disruption budget for controlling CP patch frequency
assertions.reason: The response includes a 'Multi-Environment Strategy' section with dev/production rollout sequence and mentions cluster disruption budget through the patch disruption interval configuration

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for configuring the recommended exclusion type and maintenance window
assertions.reason: The response provides multiple complete gcloud container clusters update commands with specific flags for exclusions (--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades) and maintenance windows (--maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-duration, --maintenance-window-recurrence)
